post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 164: Color Mafia

Rules
  • Do not personal attack other players
  • Do not post during night.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote anything I say in a PM, especially role PMs. This includes screenshots of a role PM, or claiming any flavor.
  • Do not use any formatting that conceals text or appears to conceal text.
  • Ask me for any rule clarifications or questions about the game in your Role PM, and only in your role PM. Do not refer to any mod communication in thread, and any necessary clarifications will be answered in thread. Any questions asked in thread will not be answered, even in bold.
  • Do not edit or delete any posts.
  • Don't gamethrow. This includes self-voting in a serious manner. Just tell me if you want to be replaced.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this game thread.


Voting
  • Vote in the form Vote: Username.
  • Vote to skip killing anyone today in the form Vote: Skip Day.
  • At the end of each day, the players with the most amount of votes is killed. Ties are broken randomly. Starting day 2, if at any point a player has more than half the votes, that player will be killed.
  • Votes are locked in LyLo. This does not include any scenario with a Serial Killer.


Activity/Day/Night
  • Day will last for 14 days.
  • Night will last for 3 days.
  • 10 days of V/LA is all you get. The whole game. When it's justified I can give extensions. Too many prods and it's obvious you are prod dodging you are out. 60 hours of inactivity=PM prod.


Setup
In this setup, there are 3 color tokens: Purple, Blue, Yellow. The players will be informed what color they are, the players are allowed to claim what color they are (or lie about them!), and the player's color will be revealed upon death.

You are informed that
1.The purple group consists of 3 Vanilla Town, 1 1-shot BP townie and 2 Mafia goons
2. The blue group consists of 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-shot BP Serial Killer, 1 Town Universal Backup
3. The yellow group consists of 1 Town color cop, 1 Mafia Tracker, 2 Vanilla Town

-A SK/mafia/town scenario results in an SK win
-The Backup role receives the role the instant a town power role with a night action dies.
-If the SK, the JK, and the mafia all target one person, the kill will still go through.
-The town color cop receives the color of a person of their choice
